STATION SIX: FLOW OF BLOOD AND BLOOD TYPING As a group, determine the flow of blood through the various structures and vessels of the heart. Be sure to identify where along that path each of the structures on the vocabulary list is located. Use the rest of this page to draw out the pathway. As a group, determine the different blood type in this station. Follow the procedure below in order to do so. • Obtain a blood-sampling tray and place two drops of the synthetic blood into the wells. • Place two drops of the Anti-a “antibody” into the well labeled a.
